mapper.insert: insert into ingestion_jobs ( document_id, group_id, job_type, status, retry_count, max_retries, worker_id, started_at, finished_at, next_retry_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{documentId}, #{groupId}, #{jobType}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetries}, #{workerId}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{lastError}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select id, document_id, group_id, job_type, status, retry_count, max_retries, worker_id, started_at, finished_at, next_retry_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at from ingestion_jobs jobs where status = #{status} and (next_retry_at is null or next_retry_at <= #{now}) and exists ( select 1 from documents documents where documents.id = jobs.document_id and documents.group_id = jobs.group_id and documents.deleted = false ) order by created_at asc, id asc limit #{limit}

select id, document_id, group_id, job_type, status, retry_count, max_retries, worker_id, started_at, finished_at, next_retry_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at from ingestion_jobs where id = #{jobId}
mapper.update: update ingestion_jobs as jobs set status = #{runningStatus}, worker_id = #{workerId}, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = null, last_error = null, updated_at = now() where id = #{jobId} and status = #{pendingStatus} and (next_retry_at is null or next_retry_at <= #{startedAt}) and exists ( select 1 from documents documents where documents.id = jobs.document_id and documents.group_id = jobs.group_id and documents.deleted = false )
